title: Smoky Flaky British Cucumber Salad
description: A quick, nut-free British salad featuring Persian cucumbers, caramelized onions, shredded smoked cheddar, and a honey‑mustard dressing for a smoky, flaky twist.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add sliced red onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized and golden brown, about 5‑6 minutes.
While the onions caramelize, whisk together 1 tsp Dijon mustard, 1 tsp honey, 1 tsp smoked paprika, salt, and pepper to make the dressing.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced Persian cucumbers, caramelized onions, shredded smoked cheddar, and chopped chives.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently until everything is evenly coated.
Serve immediately as a side or light lunch, and enjoy the smoky, flaky flavor profile of this British-inspired cucumber salad.
